'''âv-z-d-s''' ('''kavazdesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wokewash|wokewash]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wokewash|wokewash]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-z-d-s
|-
! Lemma
| kavazdesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivazdesoko|thivazdesoko]] || [[word:jivazdesoko|jivazdesoko]] || [[word:shivazdesoko|shivazdesoko]] || [[word:kivazdesoko|kivazdesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvazdesoko|thuthuvazdesoko]] || [[word:jujuvazdesoko|jujuvazdesoko]] || [[word:shushuvazdesoko|shushuvazdesoko]] || [[word:kukuvazdesoko|kukuvazdesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvazdesoko|thuvazdesoko]] || [[word:juvazdesoko|juvazdesoko]] || [[word:shuvazdesoko|shuvazdesoko]] || [[word:kuvazdesoko|kuvazdesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovazdesoko|thovazdesoko]] || [[word:jovazdesoko|jovazdesoko]] || [[word:shovazdesoko|shovazdesoko]] || [[word:kovazdesoko|kovazdesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvazdesoko|thĂŠvazdesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvazdesoko|jĂŠvazdesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvazdesoko|shĂŠvazdesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvazdesoko|kĂŠvazdesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavazdesoko|thavazdesoko]] || [[word:javazdesoko|javazdesoko]] || [[word:shavazdesoko|shavazdesoko]] || [[word:kavazdesoko|kavazdesoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
